summary.business_symptom: checkout completion rate dropped 42% (from 87% to 50%) between 14:10 and 16:00 BRT
summary.leading_finding: Postgres connection pool exhaustion on checkout-db, aligned with traffic burst from marketing campaign
summary.residual_risk: Tempo coverage for checkout service is partial — trace evidence unavailable for routes /v2/cart and /v2/finalize
top_actions: Raise checkout-db max_connections from 200 to 400 (owner: data-platform, validate: pg_stat_activity_count < 350)
Add multi-window burn-rate alert on Checkout availability SLO 99.5%/28d (owner: checkout-platform)
Enable Tempo↔Mimir exemplars on http_server_request_duration_seconds for service_name=checkout

findings.title: Checkout 5xx ratio peaked at 18%
findings.claim: Server-side error ratio crossed 18% at 14:23 BRT and stayed above 5% until 15:58 BRT
findings.impact: ~37% customer abandonment during 95 minutes; estimated R$248k revenue impact
findings.interpretation: Service returned 5xx coincident with downstream DB latency surge
findings.counter_test: If DB p95 stayed flat the cause would be upstream caller; observed DB p95 went 12ms → 850ms at the same minute, refuting the counter
findings.recommendation: Raise checkout-db connection pool ceiling; add traffic-floor burn-rate alert

findings.title: checkout-db connection pool saturation
findings.claim: active connections hit the ceiling of 200 at 14:18 BRT and remained pinned for 96 minutes
findings.impact: Database refused new acquires, propagated as 5xx upstream
findings.interpretation: Pool exhausted under campaign-driven traffic burst
findings.counter_test: If error happened without saturation, observed would stay below ceiling — refuted by sustained ceiling pin
findings.recommendation: Raise max_connections 200 → 400; add per-route concurrency limit

blind_spots: No Pyroscope coverage for checkout-svc — CPU regression invisible.
Tempo spanmetrics_calls_total returned 0 spans for /v2/finalize during the window — exemplar-driven jumps unavailable for that route.

recommendations.title: Raise checkout-db max_connections 200 → 400 with monitoring
recommendations.expected_impact: Eliminates connection-pool ceiling under campaign-grade traffic

recommendations.title: Add multi-window burn-rate alert on Checkout availability SLO 99.5%/28d
recommendations.expected_impact: Page within 5 min of 14.4× burn instead of waiting for fixed-threshold to trip

recommendations.title: Enable Tempo↔Mimir exemplars on checkout HTTP histogram
recommendations.expected_impact: Click-through from p99 spike to slow trace, no manual trace_id lookup
recommendations.validation_query: exemplar dots visible in checkout overview dashboard
